description_long: This object depicts a dual computer workstation setup typical of an internet cafe, featuring two black office chairs with white bases positioned at a long, light wood desk. Each station is equipped with a large monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a desktop computer tower, all arranged neatly on the desk. The stations are separated by tall, light gray privacy partitions that provide individual workspaces for users. The entire setup rests on a rectangular gray floor mat, with the desk supported by sturdy black legs. The design is functional and modern, emphasizing privacy and efficient use of space for multiple users. The materials and layout suggest a clean, professional environment suitable for public or semi-public use.
description: A modern dual computer workstation with privacy partitions, black office chairs, and a light wood desk, typical of an internet cafe.
description_view_0: Front view showing two computer stations with monitors, keyboards, and chairs separated by privacy partitions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the partitions, and the arrangement of the computer towers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the privacy partitions and the office chairs tucked under the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profiles of the partitions, computers, and chairs.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Two computer stations are clearly visible, each with a monitor, keyboard, mouse, and chair, separated by partitions.
